name: handle-beforesubmitprompt-unreliability
title: Handle beforeSubmitPrompt channel unreliability (C-2 confirmed)
description: C-2: beforeSubmitPrompt hook additional_context is UNRELIABLE (subagent判定 High confidence, 2026-06-24). Hook executes + emits valid JSON, but content never reaches model system context — same family as forum #158452 (sessionStart) and #158883 (beforeSubmitPrompt updated_input silently stripped). Step 1: run marker probe in main session to get definitive proof (unique hex marker in additional_context, then ask model if it sees it). Step 2: if confirmed, demote inject-retrieval-plan.py to telemetry-only (keep REC-03 triggering logs, remove additional_context dependency). Step 3: migrate critical routing directives to reliable channels — verify .cursor/rules/retrieval-routing.mdc completeness for Native/BYOK tool matrix, add AGENTS.md fallback directive to manually invoke route_codebase_retrieval.py. Step 4: update cursor-context-injection-guide.md channel matrix with beforeSubmitPrompt row marked unreliable.
creator: blxzer77
